labels: bug

## What happened?

<!-- Describe the issue. What did the coach do wrong? -->

## What did you expect?

<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

## How to reproduce

<!-- Steps to reproduce the issue, including what you asked the coach. -->

## Relevant data

- Activity type (ride, run, etc.)

- Your FTP and zone setup
